description: Configure the Wazuh manager in the `wazuh-wazuh.manager-1` container as the Master node for a cluster named 'security-ops-cluster'. The configuration in `/var/ossec/etc/ossec.conf` must use node name 'wazuh-master-01', node type 'master', key 'c987654321fedcba0123456789abcdef', and bind address '0.0.0.0'. The task is complete when the wazuh-clusterd daemon is active with these settings.
